## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Validation

- [ ] Unit tests pass locally
- [ ] Demo mode still works
- [ ] No real API keys, credentials, or private lead data are included
- [ ] Documentation was updated when behavior changed

## Test Command

```bash
make test
```

## Notes

Add screenshots, sample output, migration notes, or follow-up tasks when relevant.
